name: codex-orchestration
description: Detachable root-agent orchestration with task-oriented roles and native automatic worker selection.

interface.shortDescription: Adaptive root orchestration with functional workers
interface.longDescription: Routes task-oriented lookup, explore, build, and review roles while Codex selects worker intelligence and effort automatically and the root orchestrator retains final authority.
defaultPrompt: Use $corch status to inspect orchestration, or ask Corch to route this task.
